body:
terraswallows:

Sometimes it takes a real man to become the woman she was always meant to be.

To face a world that will see you as different, to unlearn everything they told you to be, and still choose to step forward as your true self.

Because to become your self, not the version the world expected you to be but something else entirly. It takes courage. It’s the strength to say, this is who I am, even when it would be easier to keep pretending.
